layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Asymmetry for Landing, Control Room for Admin/Checkout

components.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large 'Unbounded' typography. Glowing text shadows. Hero background image with bg-black/40 to bg-black/60 overlay to maintain text contrast.
components.buttons: Primary CTA uses #FF007F background with hover:bg-[#FF007F]/80. Sharp edges or max 4px border-radius (rounded-sm). Font: IBM Plex Sans, bold. Add focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF007F]/50.
components.checkout_box: Glassmorphism surface. bg-white/5 or bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl. 1px inner stroke border-white/10. Dense 'Control Room' grid for inputs. Shadcn Input and Select.
components.admin_dashboard: Flat solid surfaces. No glassmorphism. Deep #0D0A14 background, #1A1525 cards. Strict grid hierarchy. Use Shadcn Table for order logs.
components.success_alert: SweetAlert2 for success state (as per requirements). Style it to match dark mode: background '#1A1525', text '#FFFFFF', confirm button '#FF007F'.

animations.scroll: Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling on the landing page.
animations.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1, scale 1.02 for cards, hover state text colors must be explicitly defined.
animations.loader: ASCII art style loader or simple pulsing neon borders.

images.description: Elegant abstract 3D render featuring gradient curves in blue and pink hues. Use with black/50 overlay.
Vibrant swirl of purple and pink paint. Use as a textural background element inside cards.
Bitcoin, Ethereum coins. Use in the payment selection or CoinPayments section.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react for standard icons, keep stroke-width consistent.

tech_stack_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='checkout-submit-button', data-testid='service-select').
tech_stack_rules.components: Use Shadcn components for Select, Input, Dialog, Table. DO NOT use Shadcn Card for marketing layouts, use pure Tailwind. DO NOT use standard HTML <select> or <input type='date'>.
tech_stack_rules.forms: Admin config and Checkout forms must use controlled components (React state or react-hook-form if needed).

specific_flows.checkout: No-login flow. Select service via SMM API -> enter link & qty -> calculate price -> choose Coupon or CoinPayments -> submit. On success -> SweetAlert2 -> send API req immediately.
specific_flows.admin: DEMO/DEMO login. Dashboard: Logs (IPs, Orders), Coupon generator form (custom amount), CoinPayments config form.
